description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) Train Service Enhancement
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路(香港段)進一步提升列車服務

2024-09-13T16:14:52.CONTENT_EN:
As informed by the Mainland Railway Authorities, for the Mid-Autumn Festival and the following day (17 & 18 September) , an additional pair of sleeper trains will be added between Hong Kong West Kowloon Station (WEK) and Beijingxi Station , as well as between WEK and Shanghai Hongqiao Station, in response to the holiday demand. Tickets are available for sale starting from 13 September 2024. 

In addition, with the opening of the Meizhou-Longchuan high-speed railway, starting from September 14, the Mainland Railway Authorities have made slight adjustments to certain cross-border high-speed rail services. These adjustments mainly involve changes to the timetables and intermediate stations of the concerned trains. 

Major changes include:

- Train G6388 (departing from WEK to Chaoshan) will stop at a new intermediate station Kuitan, increasing the number of direct destinations on the Hong Kong section from 78 to 79. 

- Train G6509 (departing from Guangzhounan to WEK) will have a scheduled stop at Qingsheng. This change extends the last southbound train from Qingsheng to Hong Kong from approximately 6:17 pm to approximately 8:39 pm.   For more information, please refer to the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station or call the High Speed Rail Ticketing and Customer Service Hotline on (852) 2120 0888 or visit the High Speed Rail website www. mtr. com. hk/highspeed.
2024-09-13T16:14:52.CONTENT_CN:
內地鐵路單位通報，配合中秋節假期客運需求，中秋節當日及翌日(9月17日及18日)將會加開各一對來往香港西九龍站及北京西站、以及來往香港西九龍站及上海虹橋站的臥鋪列車，車票於9月13日起發售。

此外，配合梅龍高鐵開通，由9月14日起，內地鐵路單位就個別跨境高鐵列車相應作出輕微調整，包括更改時間表及中途站。

主要變動包括：

-G6388列車(由香港西九龍站開往潮汕站)增停新站點葵潭，令高鐵（香港段）的直達站點數目由78個增至79個;

-G6509列車(由廣州南站開往香港西九龍站)中途改停慶盛站，令慶盛南下返港的尾班車時間由現時的黃昏約6時17分延至晚上約8時39分。  有關詳情，請留意於香港西九龍站發放的最新資訊，亦可致電高速鐵路購票及客務熱綫(852)2120 0888查詢或瀏覽高速鐵路網站www.mtr.com.hk/highspeed。

As informed by Mainland Railway Authorities, some High Speed Rail train services on 16 Sep 2024 traveling between Hong Kong West Kowloon Station and Mainland have been cancelled due to expected adverse weather conditions. 

Cancelled train services:
To Shanghai Hongqiao Station : D908 / G100
To Guangzhounan Station: G6504
From Shanghai Hongqiao Station : D907 / G99
From Guangzhounan Station: G6503

For latest train schedules, please refer to 12306 official website (12306. cn), MTR HSR website, mobile app or the information available at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. 
Passengers may consider travel on the East Rail Line to Lo Wu/ Lok Ma Chau or use other transports to enter the Mainland. 
Ticket refunds should be processed within 30 days. Please use the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app and avoid coming to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.

The Transport Department (TD) anticipates that there may be a number of cross-boundary passengers using public transport services to travel via the land boundary control points during and around the Chinese Mid-Autumn Festival. In the meantime, the number of cross boundary private cars travelling to / from the Mainland / Macao via the land boundary control points will also increase substantially. The TD has put in place the corresponding traffic and transport arrangements. Travelers are advised to plan their journeys ahead and travel outside peak periods as far as possible. 

Local residents and visitors should particularly note that only MTR local lines and some Light Rail routes will provide overnight services on the evening of the Chinese Mid-Autumn Festival (i. e. the evening of 17 September). Airport Express Line, Disneyland Resort Line, and the services of East Rail Line to and from Lu Wu and Lok Ma Chau Stations will only maintain normal service hours.
